title: Import memoria Codex in Nyra locale
rule: Codex deve aggiornare questa checklist man mano che chiude i punti. Finalize blocca se restano item required open.

items.label: Core gate e selezione
evidence: Gate esterno REVIEW_REQUIRED confermato dall'owner; Core 2.0 locale ha scelto distilled_incremental_work_memory: universal-core-2.0/reports/universal-core/codex/codex_core_decision_latest.json

items.label: Importer memoria Codex
evidence: Creato nyra-codex-memory-importer, script npm nyra:import-codex-memory, test dedicato passato; import reale: 3264 eventi visti, 120 importati, 48 task contract, 60 report finali, owner private seed prudente.

items.label: Learning while working
evidence: Governance locale ora aggiorna nyra_codex_work_memory_latest.json prima di rispondere, include summary in reply/eventi, e read-only/rich chat leggono codex_work_memory_summary. Smoke governance locale passato: events=3265/120, contracts=48, reports=40.

items.label: Test e finalize
evidence: Passati: check:nyra:codex-memory-importer, local-governance, communication-adapter, chat-rich, chat-rich-generative, owner-private-memory, action-router, operational-diagnosis, branch-overlay, event-emitter, dialogue-engine, dialogue-runtime, JSON checks, program registry/map checks, smoke governance.
